tasks.label: git-fix-rebase-and-push
args: git checkout -- assets/images/achievement_cups.jpeg; git add -A; git commit --amend --no-edit; git rebase --continue; git push origin main; git status -sb

tasks.label: git-clear-stale-lock
args: $procs = Get-Process git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($procs) { $procs | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; exit 1 } else { if (Test-Path .git/index.lock) { Remove-Item .git/index.lock -Force; Write-Output 'Removed .git/index.lock' } else { Write-Output 'No index.lock present' }; git status -sb }

tasks.label: git-kill-stuck-processes
args: $procs = Get-Process git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($procs) { $procs | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Output ('Stopped git processes: ' + (($procs | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Id) -join ', ')) } else { Write-Output 'No git processes to stop' }; if (Test-Path .git/index.lock) { Remove-Item .git/index.lock -Force; Write-Output 'Removed .git/index.lock' } else { Write-Output 'No index.lock present' }; git status -sb

tasks.label: git-recover-lock-simple
args: $p=Get-Process git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($p){Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; Write-Output "Stopped git processes"}; if(Test-Path .git/index.lock){Remove-Item .git/index.lock -Force; Write-Output "Removed index lock"}; git status -sb

tasks.label: git-complete-rebase-push
args: git checkout -- assets/images/achievement_cups.jpeg; git add -A; git commit --amend --no-edit; git rebase --continue; git push origin main; git status -sb
